changes.summary: Secure enterprise ID extraction for payment history
changes.description: The GET /payments/history endpoint no longer accepts enterpriseId as a query parameter. The enterprise ID is now automatically extracted from the authenticated user's JWT claims (passed via X-Enterprise-ID header by the gateway). This prevents unauthorized access to other enterprises' payment data.

changes.summary: Admin subscription plan management endpoints added
changes.description: System administrators can now fully manage subscription plans directly through the API, including creating, updating, listing, and safely deactivating plans.

changes.summary: Billing summary and invoice endpoints added
changes.description: Enterprise administrators can now retrieve a summarized dashboard of their billing aggregates (YTD paid, outstanding balance, last payment) and list all invoices.

changes.summary: Standardized pagination and dynamic sorting across list endpoints
changes.description: All list endpoints in the payment service now return a standardized `pagination.PaginatedResponse` structure. They support `page` and `limit` query parameters, as well as safe, dynamic sorting via `sort` and `sort_dir` parameters with strict field allow-lists.

All subscription management endpoints have been removed from the enterprise-service. The enterprise-service no longer owns subscription state. Migrate all calls to the equivalent endpoints on the payment-service.

migration.after: Automated via Kafka event — no client call needed

changes.description: The payment-service is now the single source of truth for all subscription state and Stripe interactions. Four self-service and one admin endpoint are available.
System administrators can now manually set subscription state (plan, status, dates) without triggering a Stripe operation. Useful for trials and manual adjustments.

changes.summary: Enterprise base model no longer contains subscription fields
changes.description: The core Enterprise object returned by GET /enterprises, GET /enterprises/:enterpriseId, and related list endpoints no longer includes subscription-related fields (subscriptionPlanId, subscriptionStatus, currentPeriodStart, currentPeriodEnd). These fields have been removed from the database and are now exclusively owned by the payment-service. If you need subscription state alongside enterprise data, use GET /enterprises/:enterpriseId/status or /summary which include a subscription_snapshot field.

The response body of GET /enterprises/:enterpriseId/status now includes an optional subscription_snapshot object. This field is populated in real-time from the payment-service. It will be null if the enterprise has no active subscription or if the payment-service is temporarily unreachable.

changes.summary: EnterpriseSummary response shape extended with subscription_snapshot
changes.description: The response body of GET /enterprises/:enterpriseId/summary now includes an optional subscription_snapshot object with the same structure as in the status endpoint.
